project_area: wellness initiatives for medical residents and fellows
demographic_requirements: MaineHealth residents, fellows, trainee clubs, or interest groups
eligibility_summary: Open to MaineHealth residents, fellows, trainee clubs, and interest groups to fund wellness initiatives such as curriculum development, mindfulness programs, outdoor skills lessons, community-based interventions, or physical fitness programs. Grants typically range from $200 to $500, with larger amounts considered based on merit.
